# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.

Write secure code.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!}
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
      - xpack.security.authc.api_key.enabled=true
      - indices.query.bool.max_clause_count=4096
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - >
          curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!}
          http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE '"status":"(green|yellow)"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2g
          cpus: '2.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 1g
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.username=elastic
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!}
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!}
      - LOGSTASH_INTERNAL_PASSWORD=${LOGSTASH_INTERNAL_PASSWORD:-LogstashSecurePass456!}
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/config/pipelines.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/pipelines.yml:ro
      - logstash_data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5044:5044"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/tcp"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '"status":"green"' || curl -s http://localhost:9600 | grep -q "logstash"
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.5'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-KibanaSecurePass789!}
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.encryptedSavedObjects.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-a]3@#$kL9!mN2pQ5rS8tU1vW4xY7zA0bC}
      - xpack.reporting.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_REPORTING_KEY:-dE3fG6hI9jK2lM5nO8pQ1rS4tU7vW0xY}
      - xpack.security.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_SECURITY_KEY:-zA3bC6dE9fG2hI5jK8lM1nO4pQ7rS0tU}
      - server.ssl.enabled=false
      - csp.strict=true
      - csp.warnLegacyBrowsers=true
      - server.maxPayload=1048576
    volumes:
      - kibana_data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -s http://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q '"level":"available"' || curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q "200"
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk_setup
    user: "0"
    command: >
      bash -c '
        echo "Waiting for Elasticsearch to be ready...";
        until curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} http://elasticsearch:9200 | grep -q "cluster_name"; do
          sleep 5;
        done;
        echo "Elasticsearch is ready. Setting up users...";

        # Set kibana_system password
        curl -s -X POST -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/kibana_system/_password \
          -d "{\"password\":\"${KIBANA_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-KibanaSecurePass789!}\"}";

        # Create logstash_internal role
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/role/logstash_writer \
          -d "{
            \"cluster\": [\"manage_index_templates\", \"monitor\", \"manage_ilm\"],
            \"indices\": [
              {
                \"names\": [\"logstash-*\", \"syslog-*\", \"nginx-*\", \"app-*\", \"filebeat-*\"],
                \"privileges\": [\"write\", \"create\", \"create_index\", \"manage\", \"manage_ilm\"]
              }
            ]
          }";

        # Create logstash_internal user
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/logstash_internal \
          -d "{
            \"password\": \"${LOGSTASH_INTERNAL_PASSWORD:-LogstashSecurePass456!}\",
            \"roles\": [\"logstash_writer\"],
            \"full_name\": \"Logstash Internal User\"
          }";

        # Create read-only role for dashboards
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/role/logs_reader \
          -d "{
            \"indices\": [
              {
                \"names\": [\"logstash-*\", \"syslog-*\", \"nginx-*\", \"app-*\", \"filebeat-*\"],
                \"privileges\": [\"read\", \"view_index_metadata\"]
              }
            ]
          }";

        # Create ILM policy for log rotation
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_ilm/policy/logs_policy \
          -d "{
            \"policy\": {
              \"phases\": {
                \"hot\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"0ms\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"rollover\": {
                      \"max_primary_shard_size\": \"10gb\",
                      \"max_age\": \"1d\"
                    }
                  }
                },
                \"warm\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"7d\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"shrink\": { \"number_of_shards\": 1 },
                    \"forcemerge\": { \"max_num_segments\": 1 }
                  }
                },
                \"delete\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"30d\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"delete\": {}
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }";

        echo "Setup complete!";
      '
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 256m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

  filebeat:
    image: docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat:8.12.0
    container_name: filebeat
    user: root
    command: filebeat -e --strict.perms=false
    environment:
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeSecurePass123!}
    volumes:
      - ./filebeat/filebeat.yml:/usr/share/filebeat/filebeat.yml:ro
      - /var/log:/var/log/host:ro
      - /var/lib/docker/containers:/var/lib/docker/containers:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
      - filebeat_data:/usr/share/filebeat/data
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
      logstash:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - filebeat test config || exit 1
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 256m
          cpus: '0.5'
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

  nginx_proxy:
    image: nginx:1.25-alpine
    container_name: elk_nginx_proxy
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
      - ./nginx/htpasswd:/etc/nginx/htpasswd:ro
    ports:
      - "443:443"
      - "8443:8443"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      kibana:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 128m
          cpus: '0.25'
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /var/cache/nginx:size=64m
      - /var/run:size=16m
      - /tmp:size=32m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
    driver: local
    driver_opts:
      type: none
      o: bind
      device: ./data/elasticsearch
  logstash_data:
    driver: local
  kibana_data:
    driver: local
  filebeat_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  elk_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
    driver_opts:
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_icc: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade: "true"
